name: chain_gov_contract_this_time_and_materials_
method: [GOV CONTRACT] THIS TIME AND MATERIALS (T&M) TASK ORDER IS ISSUED FOR "EDITORIAL AND PUBLICATION SUPPORT SERVICES" IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE ATTACHED PERFORMA (deadline: 2026-09-30)

stages.task: scan SAM.gov for editorial/publication/content T&M contracts with deadline >= 2026-09-30
score by contract value ($50K+ floor), NAICS match (541830/541840/541922), T&M type preferred, agency editorial budget history from USASpending.gov
generate capability statement + SOW outline using Claude Max; if task order, identify prime contractor on parent IDIQ for subcontracting angle
send capability statements via cold email to contracting officers or prime contractor BD contacts using existing email infrastructure
